name: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc.
business: BigBear.ai is a specialized provider of mission-ready artificial intelligence technology, serving defense, national security, travel, and trade customers. It offers AI solutions including generative AI for defense, edge AI orchestration, digital identity verification, and supply chain management. The company derives most of its revenue from U.S. government contracts.
sellsTo: travel and trade (digital identity, supply chain)

exposures.sentence: ConductorOS arms defense operators with intelligent, resilient, and mission-ready systems of interconnected edge devices.
BigBear.ai operates where these vectors converge: national security, travel and trade.

On December 31st, 2025, BigBear.ai announced that it had completed the acquisition of Ask Sage, a platform-agnostic generative AI solution designed specifically to serve defense and intelligence customers.
Our software assets leveraging advanced vision AI technologies are the cornerstone of our commitment to innovation in identity verification and security.
Our approach to enabling our military, intelligence, and federal agencies is to facilitate the safe transport of goods and people in contested environments and at points of entry.
The majority of our employees are security-cleared and many operate alongside their customers daily, we have deep trusting relationships with unique and discerning customers in the U.S. government.
BigBear.ai is at the forefront of technological advancement in the realm of identity verification and biometrics.
Our capabilities deliver course of action decision support and event prediction and forecasting, which provides decision makers with insights at the speed of operational relevance.

catalysts.sentence: On December 31, 2025, the Company completed the acquisition of Ask Sage, Inc., a secure, multi-modal generative AI platform designed for government and enterprise use.

In January 2026, we acquired the assets of CargoSeer, a specialized AI software company delivering cargo scanning enhancement and trade risk management capabilities for customs enforcement missions worldwide.

catalysts.event: ConductorOS deployed in Talisman Sabre exercise
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, ConductorOS was central to exercise Talisman Sabre a joint exercise to strengthen military interoperability between allied forces, practice crisis-action planning and contingency responses between U.S., Australian Forces, and more than two dozen other nations.
